MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY NZEREM MADU J. AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN DARRIN BEN YU GIGI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-19-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-30-1995 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
